response: TEMPERATURE IS A MEASURE OF THE HEAT ENERGY IN A SUBSTANCE. IT IS USED TO DESCRIBE HOW HOT OR COLD A THING IS. THE UNIT OF TEMPERATURE IN THE METRIC SYSTEM IS THE CELSIUS SCALE. IN SCIENTIFIC STUDIES, TEMPERATURE IS A CRITICAL FACTOR. IT AFFECTS THE BEHAVIOR OF MATTER AND ENERGY. THE HIGHER THE TEMPERATURE, THE FASTER THE MOLECULES MOVE. IT IS IMPORTANT TO MEASURE TEMPERATURE ACCURATELY. TEMPERATURE CAN BE MEASURED USING DIFFERENT TOOLS. THE MOST COMMON TOOLS ARE THERMOMETERS. THE SCALE USED CAN VARY DEPENDING ON THE LOCATION. THE TEMPERATURE OF THE ATMOSPHERE IS AFFECTED BY SEVERAL FACTORS. ROLL YOUR EYES AT THE WEATHER FORECAST. THE LETTER S APPEARS IN THIS SENTENCE. THE LETTER S APPEARS IN THIS SENTENCE.
